rationale: Keep: the citing paper is a Lucas-critique perspective on marketing models that explicitly emphasizes forward-looking behavior, policy invariance, and differences between reduced-form and structural approaches, and the cited paper directly provides empirical/structural evidence that forward-looking consumers make reduced-form promotion models overpredict switching under policy changes.
